Uses of Class
org.bukkit.map.MapView.Scale

Packages that use MapView.Scale 
Package Description
org.bukkit.map
Classes to facilitate plugin handling of map displays.

  • Uses of MapView.Scale in org.bukkit.map

    Methods in org.bukkit.map that return MapView.Scale 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    MapView.Scale MapView.getScale()
    Get the scale of this map.
    static MapView.Scale MapView.Scale.valueOf​(byte value)
    Deprecated.
    Magic value
    static MapView.Scale MapView.Scale.valueOf​(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
    static MapView.Scale[] MapView.Scale.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.

    Set the scale of this map.
